evals.name: first_use_no_config
evals.prompt: 我刚学完一堂关于 AI 与学习效率的课，想和你共学一下。这是课程原文：<long lesson text>
expected_behavior: Asks one concise knowledge-mode question if no config is present
Calls three-level-notes when lesson text is available

evals.name: folder_mode
evals.prompt: 用 course-companion-open 学这堂课。扫描 /Users/me/Documents/notes 这个文件夹，找相关旧笔记。
expected_behavior: Uses folder mode without asking the mode question again

evals.name: obsidian_mode
evals.prompt: 这是我的 Obsidian vault：/Users/me/Vault。只扫 读书笔记 和 知识卡片。帮我学这堂课。
expected_behavior: Understands note titles, frontmatter, tags, and wikilinks when present
Does not scan the entire vault unless requested

evals.name: near_neighbor_course_design
evals.prompt: 帮我设计一门面向管理者的 AI 课程，包括课程目标和教学活动。
expected_behavior: Routes to a course design or instructional design workflow instead
